ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Required. Full path to the pandoc binary, or just `pandoc` to rely on $PATH.
ast.target: 必需。pandoc二进制文件的完整路径，或仅输入`pandoc`以依赖$PATH。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Required. Absolute filesystem path where exported books are written. `~` is expanded to your home directory. The plugin refuses to export until this is set. Example: ~/Downloads or /home/me/Books.
ast.target: 必需。导出书籍写入的绝对文件系统路径。`~`将展开为您的主目录。插件在设置此路径前将拒绝导出。示例：~/Downloads 或 /home/me/Books。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list. Used by "Export to all formats" when the manifest doesn't specify any.
ast.target: 逗号分隔的列表。当清单未指定任何格式时，由“导出为所有格式”使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pandoc PDF engine used unless the book overrides it. Typst is recommended — single small binary, no LaTeX install needed.
ast.target: 除非书籍覆盖，否则使用的Pandoc PDF引擎。推荐Typst——单个小型二进制文件，无需安装LaTeX。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: BCP-47 code (en, fr, ...) used when the manifest doesn't set one.
ast.target: BCP-47代码（en, fr, ...），当清单未设置时使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list. Used when the manifest doesn't define `authors:` in its frontmatter. Leave empty to fall back to "Anonymous".
ast.target: 逗号分隔的列表。当清单未在其前置元数据中定义`authors:`时使用。留空则回退到“匿名”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Frontmatter key read for the book cover. Value can be a vault-relative path, an absolute path, an [[wikilink]], or an http(s) URL (downloaded to the temp folder before pandoc runs). Default: cover.
ast.target: 读取书籍封面的前置元数据键。值可以是保险库相对路径、绝对路径、[[wikilink]]或http(s) URL（在pandoc运行前下载到临时文件夹）。默认值：cover。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When on, `![[Note]]` embeds inside inlined notes are recursively expanded with the embedded note's body. Default off — embeds are dropped (only image embeds are kept). Cycle detection and the depth limit below keep recursion safe.
ast.target: 启用时，内联笔记中的`![[Note]]`嵌入将递归展开为嵌入笔记的正文。默认关闭——嵌入被丢弃（仅保留图像嵌入）。循环检测和下面的深度限制确保递归安全。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum recursion depth for note-embed expansion. 1 = direct embeds only; 2 = embeds of embeds; etc. Embeds at the depth limit are replaced with their display title.
ast.target: 笔记嵌入展开的最大递归深度。1 = 仅直接嵌入；2 = 嵌入的嵌入；等等。达到深度限制的嵌入将替换为其显示标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of heading names (case-insensitive) to skip. Applied to the manifest before parsing (drops authoring scaffolding like "Title Options", "Target Audience") and to each linked note when inlining (drops housekeeping sections like "Related", "References").
ast.target: 逗号分隔的标题名称列表（不区分大小写）以跳过。在解析前应用于清单（删除“标题选项”、“目标受众”等创作脚手架），并在内联时应用于每个链接笔记（删除“相关”、“参考”等维护部分）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Forwarded to pandoc as `-V monofont=…` for code blocks. Examples: Liberation Mono, DejaVu Sans Mono, JetBrainsMono NF.
ast.target: 作为`-V monofont=…`转发给pandoc，用于代码块。示例：Liberation Mono, DejaVu Sans Mono, JetBrainsMono NF。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Forwarded as `#set image(width: <value>)` in the Typst preamble — caps every image at this width when the PDF engine is Typst. Common values: `100%` (fit text width — default), `80%`, `15cm`. Leave empty to disable.
ast.target: 在Typst前言中作为`#set image(width: <value>)`转发——当PDF引擎为Typst时，将每个图像限制在此宽度。常用值：`100%`（适应文本宽度——默认值）、`80%`、`15cm`。留空以禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled (default), the TOC depth is computed from the deepest heading level actually present in the manifest (parts + chapters → depth 3, flat chapters → depth 2). Disable to fall back to the static TOC depth below. Per-book `book_export.toc_depth` always wins.
ast.target: 启用时（默认），目录深度根据清单中实际存在的最深标题级别计算（部分+章节 → 深度3，扁平章节 → 深度2）。禁用则回退到下面的静态目录深度。每本书的`book_export.toc_depth`始终优先。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used when "Auto TOC depth" is off, or when the manifest has no parseable heading.
ast.target: 当“自动目录深度”关闭时使用，或当清单没有可解析的标题时使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Forwards `--number-sections` to pandoc — headings get hierarchical numbers (1, 1.1, 1.1.1, ...). Per-book override: `book_export.number_sections`.
ast.target: 将`--number-sections`转发给pandoc——标题获得层次结构编号（1, 1.1, 1.1.1, ...）。每本书覆盖：`book_export.number_sections`。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Insert a page break before each top-level section (the lowest-numbered heading level used in the manifest).
ast.target: 在每个顶级部分（清单中使用的最低编号标题级别）之前插入分页符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Useful when an export fails to inspect the compiled manuscript.
ast.target: 当导出失败时，用于检查编译后的手稿。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Related, References, Title Options, Target Audience
ast.target: 相关、参考、标题选项、目标受众

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Output folder is not configured. Set "Default output folder" in Settings → Book Exporter (e.g. ~/Downloads).
ast.target: 输出文件夹未配置。请在设置 → 书籍导出器中设置“默认输出文件夹”（例如 ~/Downloads）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Output folder is not configured. Set it in Settings → Book Exporter.
ast.target: 输出文件夹未配置。请在设置 → 书籍导出器中设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Open the book manifest note before running this command.
ast.target: 请先打开书籍清单笔记再运行此命令。

ast.name: label
ast.source: None — notes flow into one another (legacy)
ast.target: 无 — 笔记相互衔接（旧版）

ast.name: message
ast.source: Missing or default `authors` field — falling back to "Anonymous".
ast.target: 缺少或使用默认的 `authors` 字段 — 回退为“匿名”。

ast.name: message
ast.source: No sections found. The manifest body must contain at least one ## heading with a list of wikilinks underneath.
ast.target: 未找到章节。清单正文必须包含至少一个 ## 标题，其下有一个wikilink列表。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Manifest has sections but no resolved note references. Add bulleted wikilinks under your headings.
ast.target: 清单有章节但没有解析的笔记引用。请在标题下添加带项目符号的wikilink。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Export current book to all formats
ast.target: 将当前书籍导出为所有格式
